# Development

## Prerequisites

- Go 1.22+ (the project uses Go 1.26.1)
- [pre-commit](https://pre-commit.com/) (optional but recommended -- CI enforces the same checks)
- [golangci-lint](https://golangci-lint.run/) v2.11+
- [hadolint](https://github.com/hadolint/hadolint) (Dockerfile linting, used by pre-commit)

## Building

```bash
go build -o screws-box ./cmd/screwsbox
```

Or using Make with version injection:

```bash
make build
# Equivalent to: CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -ldflags="-s -w -X main.version=$(git describe --tags --always --dirty)" -o screws-box ./cmd/screwsbox
```

The binary is statically linked (`CGO_ENABLED=0`) thanks to the pure-Go SQLite driver.

## Dev Mode

Dev mode reads templates and static files from disk instead of the embedded copies, so changes are reflected without rebuilding:

```bash
go run -tags dev ./cmd/screwsbox
```

This uses `embed_dev.go` (build tag `dev`) which serves from the filesystem. Without the tag, `embed_prod.go` embeds assets into the binary at compile time via `go:embed`.

## Project Structure

```
cmd/screwsbox/       Entrypoint: env parsing, dependency wiring, signal handling
internal/
  model/             Domain types (Shelf, Container, Item, Tag) and helpers
  store/             SQLite persistence (schema, CRUD, export/import)
  session/           Session management (Store interface, MemoryStore, RedisStore, Manager)
  server/            HTTP layer (chi router, handlers, middleware, embedded assets)
  oidc/              OpenID Connect integration (discovery, PKCE, encrypted cookies)
```

See [docs/ARCHITECTURE.md](ARCHITECTURE.md) for detailed component descriptions.

## Pre-commit Hooks

Install pre-commit hooks locally:

```bash
pre-commit install
```

Hooks run automatically on `git commit`:
- `go-fmt` -- format Go files
- `golangci-lint` -- lint with project config (`.golangci.yml`)
- `go-build` -- verify compilation
- `go-mod-tidy` -- ensure `go.mod` is tidy
- `go-unit-tests` -- run `go test ./...`
- `go-mod-verify` -- verify module checksums
- `hadolint` -- lint Dockerfiles
- `trailing-whitespace`, `end-of-file-fixer`, `check-yaml`, `check-added-large-files`

CI runs the same pre-commit checks on pull requests.

## Linting

The project uses golangci-lint v2 with a curated set of linters defined in `.golangci.yml`. Notable enabled linters: `gosec`, `errcheck`, `gocritic`, `gocyclo`, `staticcheck`, `revive`, `sloglint`, `testifylint`, `tagliatelle` (enforces `snake_case` JSON tags).

```bash
golangci-lint run ./...
```

## Running Tests

```bash
go test ./... -count=1
```

See [docs/TESTING.md](TESTING.md) for test architecture and coverage details.

## CI Pipeline

GitHub Actions runs on pull requests to `master` (`.github/workflows/ci.yml`):

1. **Pre-commit checks** -- same hooks as local development
2. **Build and test** -- `go build` + `go test ./... -count=1`

CI skips for changes to `LICENSE`, `*.md`, `assets/**`, `.vscode/**`.

## Release Pipeline

On push to `master` (`.github/workflows/release.yml`):

1. Pre-commit + build + test (same as CI)
2. **Auto-versioning** -- scans commit messages since last tag: `feat:` bumps minor, `fix:` bumps patch
3. **GitHub Release** -- creates tag, generates changelog, publishes release
4. **Docker image** -- builds and pushes to `ghcr.io/{repo}` with version tag + `latest`

Version is injected into the binary via `-X main.version=${VERSION}` at Docker build time.

## Key Dependencies

| Package | Purpose |
|---------|---------|
| [chi v5](https://github.com/go-chi/chi) | HTTP router (stdlib-compatible) |
| [modernc.org/sqlite](https://pkg.go.dev/modernc.org/sqlite) | CGo-free SQLite driver |
| [go-oidc v3](https://github.com/coreos/go-oidc) | OpenID Connect client |
| [go-redis v9](https://github.com/redis/go-redis) | Redis client for session storage |
| [x/crypto](https://pkg.go.dev/golang.org/x/crypto) | bcrypt password hashing |
| [x/time](https://pkg.go.dev/golang.org/x/time) | Token bucket rate limiter |
| [testify](https://github.com/stretchr/testify) | Test assertions (assert + require) |
